name: HY-Motion: The fighter pivots on the lead foot, spins the body 180 degrees while lifting the rear knee, then whips the lower leg around in a wide horizontal arc to strike with the heel. After impact, the kicking leg continues its momentum to land forward, and the fighter immediately squares up the hips and raises both arms to guard the head
